creator: nils@tisys.org
text:
Add "The Indispensable PC Hardware Book" by Hans-Peter Messmer to
	the bibliography section of the handbook. I own the German version
	of this book, and it's really great. About 1000 pages full of accurate
	and well-written information. So I had teh feeling that this one should
	not be missing from our bibliography section. Notice that I added
	the fourth edition of the book. This is not yet available, but
	will be released on the 28th of December, according to Addison-Wesley.
	It can already be pre-ordered AW and most online booksellers, so I
	thought I might well add this soon-to-be-released edition instead
	of the two years old, current edition.

Fix: Apply the following diff to handbook/bibliography/chapter.sgml

How-To-Repeat: 	Not much to be repeated here...
